title: mikania ochroleuca
intro: Mikania ochroleuca, also known as the green mile plant, is a perennial vine native to South America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Mikania ochroleuca include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to treat diabetes, hypertension, and cancer. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
